title: Sweep broader server
summary: Athenwork guidance says assistants should not scrape unseen Discord server history; use visible thread context plus Beads/repo/CASS evidence. If the user needs broader Discord context, request pasted/exported content, relevant mentions, or offer a Beads/session sweep instead.

title: Leave queued without repository changes
summary: Treat Leave queued as no repository changes: no bead opened, no patch prompt generated, no file inspection, no tests, and no commits. Known review blockers can remain queued without mutation when the user selects Leave queued.

title: Review child creation for Hermes upgrade aftercare
summary: Treat Beads creation success separately from auto-export git add warnings; verify the mutation with bd show and push Dolt state. Create a review child for a closed parent upgrade bead when the requested scope is aftercare review rather than source implementation.

title: Scheduled Check audit rules
summary: Scheduled Check should be a bounded read-only health and pickup audit, not permission to claim beads, implement patches, commit files, or restart services. Return exactly [SILENT] only when there is no material new state compared with the last delivered report. Tracked skill edits or relevant untracked skill reference files are material scheduled-check state and should be reported. Do not run hermes update for the customized Amtiskaw deployment just because hermes version says an update is available. Port 34143 was observed during the current runtime check.

title: Closed Hermes coordination bead with review blockers
summary: Closed implementation beads with untracked review artifacts can still justify creating a follow-up bead instead of treating the lane as fully final. Presence unavailable means unknown or low-confidence fallback evidence, not proof that a candidate is free.

title: Nousromancer product lane thesis
summary: Nousromancer product doctrine should frame the first wedge as interruption recovery rather than dashboard styling. Nousromancer should orient, stage, expose evidence, and prepare actions; it should not become a governance layer or durable source of truth.
